notes: Unsigned preview release. Reworks the result viewer into a dedicated image preview (mouse-wheel zoom that no longer scrolls the panel, double-click full preview, drag-to-pan), collapses provider info to an inline chip, adds history newest/oldest sorting with drag-to-reference, and OS drag-and-drop image upload. Fixes drag-drop path resolution for Electron 39 (webUtils.getPathForFile) and the Windows in-app updater timeout/process blocking. macOS artifacts are ad-hoc signed and not Apple-notarized; Gatekeeper may warn on first launch.
